base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of cloud_tile_palette2 — a background_layer (parallax_single) from 1985 super mario bros. Cloud decoration tile from Palette 2 (Water and Sky) — non-solid background decor. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Cloud decoration tile from Palette 2 (Water and Sky) — non-solid background decor; different cloud shapes for overworld/mushrooms/snow submapping
